title: Tiger police style elastic notebook pad with pencil
features: Popular police style notebook ideal for birdwatchers, referees, shoppers etc. Pocket size (85x130mm) with 96 feint ruled sheets. Elastic closure loop and holder for 90mm pencil (included).
